chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-1192 0f 2023 Date Order with signature of Jucge For orcers on officg objections For hearing of main case 28.03.2024 Mr, Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents Mr Asfand Yar Kharal AAG ٠ # # + + »٦بب+ + + ٣ ەھ Petitioner has filed this petition for seeking oirection Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur to calculate the actual amount of her family pension In response, Counsel for the Respondents No.2 & 3 has submitted the statement with complete breakup and observing Turther that she getting monthly pension regularly Petitioners Counsel is disputing the amount by relying some documents submitted in some other petition We have no reason to dispute the statement filed DV the Respondents N.2 and ٨٥٥٨5 ascertain the factual controversy between the parties Petitioner claims to be unmarried daughter 3٨٥ getting monthly Dension regularly No case f٥r inoulgence made out Petition is therefore, dismissed accqidingly
